access_auth_code_instructions.message: Para acessar seu código de autenticação, crie uma conta e faça login em {link}ur.io{/link}. Depois de logado, copie um código de autenticação e use-o para entrar na extensão.
access_auth_code_instructions.description: Instructions for accessing the authentication code. Use the {link}...{/link} markers to wrap the "ur.io" portion, which should be rendered as a clickable link. Example usage: - Web: Replace {link} with and {/link} with - SwiftUI: Use AttributedString parsing to detect {link}...{/link} and apply .link attribute to the range - Jetpack Compose: Use AnnotatedString with an annotation for the {link}...{/link} range, and handle clicks accordingly

auth_code_input_invalid.message: Código de autenticação inválido ou expirado. Faça login em ur.io para obter um código válido.
auth_code_input_invalid.description: Invalid auth code input error message

auth_code_input_placeholder.message: Digite seu código de autenticação único
auth_code_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the authentication code input field

back.description: Button text for going back to the previous screen.

best_available_provider.description: VPN providers list option to select the best available provider

best_matches.description: Label for a list or section showing the best matching results.

cities.description: Provider list group title for cities

connect.description: Button text to connect to URnetwork VPN

countries.description: Provider list group title for countries

devices.description: Provider list group title for devices

dont_see_it.description: Prompt shown when user doesn't see the verification email or SMS.

get_started.description: Button text for beginning the login or create network process used on the Initial Auth screen.

its_nice_to_see_you_again.description: Greeting text on Enter user auth password screen.

join_urnetwork.description: Join URnetwork title on the Create Network screen

launch.description: Button text for entering the one-time authentication code and entering the app

network_name_input_hint.message: Os nomes de rede devem ter 6 caracteres ou mais
network_name_input_hint.description: Hint text indicating the required length for a network name input.

network_name_input_label.description: Label for the network name input field

network_name_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the network name input field.

network_name_taken.message: Este nome de rede já está em uso
network_name_taken.description: Error for network name input to display when a network name is already taken.

password.description: Label for the password input field.

password_input_length_hint.message: A senha deve ter pelo menos 12 caracteres
password_input_length_hint.description: Hint for password input length requirements.

promoted.description: VPN providers list option for promoted providers

regions.description: Provider list group title for regions

resend_code.description: Button text to resend the verification code

stay_completely_private_and_anonymous.description: Used as a headline in the Initial Auth carousel.

terms_checkbox.message: Concordo com os {terms_start}Termos e Serviços{terms_end} e a {privacy_start}Política de Privacidade{privacy_end} da URnetwork
terms_checkbox.description: Label for the terms and conditions acceptance checkbox. It should read like "I agree to URnetwork's Terms and Services and Privacy Policy" The {terms_start} and {terms_end} markers wrap the "Terms and Services" text. The {privacy_start} and {privacy_end} markers wrap the "Privacy Policy" text. Platform-specific rendering: - Web: Replace {terms_start} with , {terms_end} with , etc. - iOS: Use these markers to identify ranges for NSAttributedString link attributes - Android: Use these markers to identify ranges for ClickableSpan

user_auth_input_label.description: Label for the user authentication input field.

user_auth_input_placeholder.message: Insira seu e-mail ou número de telefone
user_auth_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the user authentication input field.

verify_explanation.message: Conte-nos quem você realmente é. Digite o código que enviamos para verificar sua identidade.
verify_explanation.description: Sub header text explaining why verification is needed.

verify_input_invalid.message: Houve um problema ao autenticar seu código de verificação.
verify_input_invalid.description: Error message shown when the verification code input is invalid.

verify_input_label.description: Label for the verification code input field
